entries.candidate: Supabase project used for authentication and database
entries.retention: Account and application records persist until user deletion. The Free tier has no automatic daily database backup; the operator-tested manual logical export and isolated restore method makes no continuous recovery commitment.

entries.candidate: Supabase Storage using its S3-compatible endpoint
entries.region: Canada Central (ca-central-1 endpoint verified during the isolated restore exercise)
entries.retention: Active objects remain until user/account deletion. Active and quarantine objects are removed through the Storage API within 24 hours of an applicable deletion or terminal scan failure. S3 versioning is unavailable; deleted objects are permanent and cannot be restored.
entries.contract: Supabase standard Free-tier terms and privacy/subprocessor terms

entries.candidate: OpenAI API selected and authorized by each user through a user-supplied API key; only hosted model provider allowlisted at launch
entries.retention: Controlled by the user's provider account and applicable OpenAI API terms; ROSS makes no separate provider-retention promise
entries.trainingUse: Controlled by the user's provider account and applicable OpenAI API terms

entries.candidate: Supabase Auth account-email delivery and its disclosed subprocessors
entries.region: Provider-managed delivery may involve processing outside Canada
entries.retention: Provider operational and delivery records follow Supabase terms
entries.contract: Supabase standard Free-tier terms and subprocessor disclosures

entries.retention: Provider-native operational logs follow Fly.io terms; application content logging is prohibited in hosted mode
